DiagnosisText.html.en:
This section asks who provided {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP diagnosis and what diagnostic procedures they used to arrive at their conclusion.

You may have seen multiple vets about {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP symptoms. Please answer the question about the vet who provided the definitive diagnosis, i.e., the one you used to make decisions about {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP.
DiagnosisText.html._source:
This section asks who provided {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP diagnosis and what diagnostic procedures they used to arrive at their conclusion.

You may have seen multiple vets about {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP symptoms. Please answer the question about the vet who provided the definitive diagnosis, i.e., the one you used to make decisions about {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP.

DiagnosisWho.title.en: Which veterinary professional provided you with the definitive LP/GOLPP diagnosis:
DiagnosisWho.title._source: Which veterinary professional provided you with the definitive LP/GOLPP diagnosis:

DiagnosticType.title.en: What diagnostic procedure was used to arrive at the definitive diagnosis?
DiagnosticType.title._source: What diagnostic procedure was used to arrive at the definitive diagnosis?

DiagnosticType.choices.SCOPE.text.en: Video endoscope or laryngoscope under anesthesia
DiagnosticType.choices.SCOPE.text._source: Video endoscope or laryngoscope under anesthesia

DiagnosisStage.title.en: Was {CmpnName} diagnosed with unilateral or bilateral LP?
DiagnosisStage.title._source: Was {CmpnName} diagnosed with unilateral or bilateral LP?

DiagnosisStage.choices.WASNT_TOLD.text.en: I wasn't told what stage {CmpnName}'s LP was in
DiagnosisStage.choices.WASNT_TOLD.text._source: I wasn't told what stage {CmpnName}'s LP was in

DiagnosisTimeAfterSymptoms.title.en: About how long after {CmpnName}'s first symptoms appeared did you get the diagnosis?:
DiagnosisTimeAfterSymptoms.title._source: About how long after {CmpnName}'s first symptoms appeared did you get the diagnosis?:

DiagnosisTimeAfterSymptoms.choices.SIX_T.en: Between six months and a year
DiagnosisTimeAfterSymptoms.choices.SIX_T._source: Between six months and a year

DiagnosisCost.title.en: What was the pre-insurance cost of the diagnosis?
DiagnosisCost.title._source: What was the pre-insurance cost of the diagnosis?

DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.title.en: Did the surgeon perform the diagnosis without requiring surgery afterwards?
DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.title._source: Did the surgeon perform the diagnosis without requiring surgery afterwards?

DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.description.en: In other words, did the surgeon refuse to do the diagnosis unless you agreed to go straight to surgery if the results were positive?
DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.description._source: In other words, did the surgeon refuse to do the diagnosis unless you agreed to go straight to surgery if the results were positive?

DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.choices.YES.t.en: Yes, required surgery consent before diagnosis
DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.choices.YES.t._source: Yes, required surgery consent before diagnosis

DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.choices.NO.te.en: No, did not require surgery consent for diagnosis
DiagnosisSurgeonContingent.choices.NO.te._source: No, did not require surgery consent for diagnosis
